content_body: Grumpy Old Men Brewing opened in 2013 by a couple of beer enthusiasts who enjoyed home brewing and went commercial in a big way. Their uniquely crafted beers are part of the Blue Ridge, GA, food and drink scene. Their mission statement is simple - "If we don't like it, we don't drink it; if we don't drink it, we don't sell it."
title: Grumpy Old Men Brewing
